title: Expenses
description: One real amount spent on the trip — a meal, a taxi, a museum ticket, a hotel night. The treasurer splits it across travelers and rolls it up against the budget. Distinct from bookings (a reservation) though an expense may reference one.

tripId.description: the trip this expense belongs to

paidByTravelerId.description: the traveler who paid (null = shared/unknown payer)

description.description: what the money was for, e.g. 'dinner at Ramiro'

currency.description: ISO currency code the amount is in, e.g. 'EUR'

bookingId.description: the reservation this expense settles, if any (kept when the booking is removed → set null)

itineraryItemId.description: the itinerary item this expense is for, if any

payer.description: the traveler who fronted the money

item.description: the itinerary item it is for

shares.description: how this expense is split across travelers
